headline: Caterpillar Inc (CAT): Meet Your Unlikely Data Center Stock
summary: Caterpillar Inc (NYSE:CAT) is one of the best long-term stocks to invest in according to Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation Trust. Caterpillar shares have gained around 50% since the year began and have surged more than 148% over the past year. headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks with Competitive Advantages
summary: Stocks that outperform the market usually share key traits such as rising sales, expanding margins, and increasing returns on capital. The select few that can do all three for many years are often the ones that make you life-changing money.

headline: Caterpillar (CAT) Surges 3.1%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Caterpillar (CAT) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
